resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def minimumCost(self, s: str) -> int:
        n = len(s)
        res = 0
        for i in range(1, n):
            if s[i] != s[i-1]:
                res += min(i, n - i)
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Traverse the string once; whenever adjacent characters differ, add the cheaper of flipping the prefix ending at i-1 or the suffix starting at i. This greedy choice is optimal because each flip fixes all preceding or succeeding mismatches in one move.
